# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.8"

services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-master
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    command: ["redis-server", "--appendonly", "yes", "--min-slaves-to-write", "0"]
    volumes:
      - redis-master-data:/data

  redis-slave:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-slave
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    ports:
      - "6380:6379"
    command: ["redis-server", "--replicaof", "redis-master", "6379", "--appendonly", "yes"]
    volumes:
      - redis-slave-data:/data

volumes:
  redis-master-data:
  redis-slave-data:
